notes: No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (fiscal_kpis: null).
All 32 candidates come from the single substantive event 0001546417-24-000158 (8-K Q3 2024 earnings press release, 2024-11-08); every evidence_quote verified as an exact substring of its content.

Skipped 3 events as vague (header-only stubs, no narrative text): 0001546417-24-000153 (8-K 2024-10-24, Item 5.02 officer changes), 0001546417-24-000147 (8-K 2024-09-24, Item 1.01/2.03 material agreement and direct financial obligation), 0001546417-24-000129 (8-K 2024-08-26, Item 5.02/7.01).

Naming-rule adjustments: 'executive transition costs' renamed executive_severance_costs (transition is banned; severance is in the source footnote); 'Strategic Re-Franchise of Brazil Operations' named brazil_franchise_partnership (source's own phrase 'Brazil franchise partnership', avoids -ing transaction verb and the counterparty name); restaurant openings not coined ('opening' banned), only restaurant_closures; Hong Kong-specific closure folded into restaurant_closures (single-instance per R10); G&A umbrella line skipped in favor of its two named causes (executive_severance_costs, strategic_initiative_consulting_fees); forward-looking-statements risk-factor boilerplate list not mined (generic enumeration, not attributed causes).
Brand-level comparable-sales drivers coined per R9 (brand metric = own driver, separate from company-wide same_store_sales).
